SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto

Class ErrorResponse

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.ErrorResponse
public class ErrorResponse extends Object
Structured error response returned by the API when a request fails. Produced by GlobalExceptionHandler for validation errors, illegal argument exceptions, and any uncaught runtime exceptions. The code field is a machine-readable error token that clients can switch on; the details list carries field-level validation messages when applicable.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ErrorResponse()
    Constructs an empty error response (for deserialization).
    ErrorResponse(String message, String code, List<String> details)
    Constructs a fully populated error response, setting status = "ERROR" and the timestamp to now.

  • Constructor Details

    • ErrorResponse

      public ErrorResponse()
      Constructs an empty error response (for deserialization).

    • ErrorResponse

      public ErrorResponse(String message, String code, List<String> details)
      Constructs a fully populated error response, setting status = "ERROR" and the timestamp to now.
      Parameters:
      message - human-readable failure description
      code - machine-readable error token
      details - field-level detail messages; may be an empty list but not null

  • Method Details

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the status label.
      Returns:
      always "ERROR"

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the status label.
      Parameters:
      status - status string

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Returns the human-readable error description.
      Returns:
      error message

    • setMessage

      public void setMessage(String message)
      Sets the human-readable error description.
      Parameters:
      message - error message

    • getCode

      public String getCode()
      Returns the machine-readable error code.
      Returns:
      error code token

    • setCode

      public void setCode(String code)
      Sets the machine-readable error code.
      Parameters:
      code - error code token

    • getDetails

      public List<String> getDetails()
      Returns the list of detail messages.
      Returns:
      detail messages; never null when constructed via the primary constructor

    • setDetails

      public void setDetails(List<String> details)
      Sets the detail messages.
      Parameters:
      details - field-level validation messages or other supplemental details

    • getTimestamp

      public Instant getTimestamp()
      Returns the server-side creation timestamp.
      Returns:
      timestamp at the moment the error response was created

    • setTimestamp

      public void setTimestamp(Instant timestamp)
      Sets the creation timestamp.
      Parameters:
      timestamp - error response creation time
